span.p:
Is the response content deterministic
and must always be exact?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Authored topic with slot-filling
and explicit confirmation

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Does the intent require reading or writing
live data or calling an external system?

span.p:
Authored topic + Power Automate action
with confirmation node

span.p:
Power Automate action call
from a topic or generative plugin

span.p:
Is the answer available in a
structured knowledge source?

span.p:
Generative answers from knowledge source
